title: ERRO[0000] +(UNHANDLED LOGLEVEL) &imagebuilder.Step
body:
### Issue Description

The message when `Dockerfile` is invalid is unreadable.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. 
```dockerfile
FROM ubuntu:24.04

WORKDIR /app
EXPOSE 3000

# add js runtime
RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y curl
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
```

2.
```sh
✗ podman build . -t h
STEP 1/15: FROM ubuntu:24.04
STEP 2/15: WORKDIR /app
--> Using cache 5fd5c45aafa8ff0986caca862a3120035c65408df6d06dcf4ec3d65763247064
--> 5fd5c45aafa8
STEP 3/15: EXPOSE 3000
--> Using cache fca775804e57cc5ca2f5ef3912cac46b27bc3614589bc12b3f97d3a11b9c8ac9
--> fca775804e57
STEP 4/15: RUN apt-get update  && apt-get install -y curl
--> Using cache 4b2b6d378adbf1ff39b03faaa3f891cad4e8b0875d2336d32d6de7af606f53f8
--> 4b2b6d378adb
STEP 5/15: && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
ERRO[0000] +(UNHANDLED LOGLEVEL) &imagebuilder.Step{Env:[]string{"PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"}, Command:"&&", Args:[]string{""}, Flags:[]string{}, Attrs:map[string]bool(nil), Message:"&& ", Heredocs:[]parser.Heredoc(nil), Original:"&& rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"} 
Error: building at STEP "&& ": Build error: Unknown instruction: "&&" &imagebuilder.Step{Env:[]string{"PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"}, Command:"&&", Args:[]string{""}, Flags:[]string{}, Attrs:map[string]bool(nil), Message:"&& ", Heredocs:[]parser.Heredoc(nil), Original:"&& rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"}
```


### Describe the results you received

See above.

### Describe the results you expected

ERROR: Invalid Dockerfile at lines 7-9.

### podman info output

comments.body:
This bug does not persist on upstream podman and buildah, in new releases you should this fixed.

```console
pc@pc:~/work/podman/bin$ ./podman build -t test .
STEP 1/5: FROM ubuntu:24.04
STEP 2/5: WORKDIR /app
--> 2e91d3c56211
STEP 3/5: EXPOSE 3000
--> 45e870e5a775
STEP 4/5: RUN apt-get update  && apt-get install -y curl
Get:1 http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-security InRelease [126 kB]
Get:2 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble InRelease [256 kB]
Get:3 http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-security/main amd64 Packages [807 kB]
Get:4 http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-security/restricted amd64 Packages [842 kB]
Get:5 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-updates InRelease [126 kB]
Get:6 http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-security/multiverse amd64 Packages [24.2 kB]
Get:7 http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-security/universe amd64 Packages [1053 kB]
Get:8 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-backports InRelease [126 kB]
Get:9 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble/multiverse a
```
@flouthoc perhaps you didn't copy the last line, because it is absent from the log.

@abitrolly My bad your containerfile must include the backslash (`\`) as an escape character for line continuation

```Dockerfile
FROM ubuntu:24.04

WORKDIR /app
EXPOSE 3000

# add js runtime
RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y curl \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
```


this fixes things for me

@flouthoc I know,, but that's not a support request. It is a request to provide a user friendly error message to troubleshoot issue such as this one.
